title: Querying a table with an index via a view does not resolve the index
description:
### What happens?

I have a table `traces`, which has an index on `trace_id`. Querying the table directly, the index is used as expected.

Querying the table via a view, which is created like `CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT * FROM traces;` does not use the index in 1.2.x or preview - but it did use the index in 1.1.3.

### To Reproduce

Use the sample eth traces parquet file:

```shell
wget https://public-data.spiceai.org/large_eth_traces.parquet
```

Then run the following commands in the duckdb-cli:

```sql
-- Data setup
CREATE TABLE traces AS
    SELECT * FROM read_parquet('large_eth_traces.parquet');

CREATE VIEW traces_view AS
    SELECT * FROM traces;

-- Test without indexes
.timer on
.mode trash
SELECT * FROM traces WHERE trace_id = 'call_0x22ba49176f15ec5524434d87c47fc9dbff6ef8f584889ab4f0fa830d76a678d4_7_3_2_0_0_0_0_0';
SELECT * FROM traces_view WHERE trace_id = 'call_0x22ba49176f15ec5524434d87c47fc9dbff6ef8f584889ab4f0fa830d76a678d4_7_3_2_0_0_0_0_0';
.timer off
.mode duckbox

-- Test with indexes
CREATE INDEX idx_traces ON traces(trace_id);
.timer on
.mode trash
SELECT * FROM traces WHERE trace_id = 'call_0x22ba49176f15ec5524434d87c47fc9dbff6ef8f584889ab4f0fa830d76a678d4_7_3_2_0_0_0_0_0';
SELECT * FROM traces_view WHERE trace_id = 'call_0x22ba49176f15ec5524434d87c47fc9dbff6ef8f584889ab4f0fa830d76a678d4_7_3_2_0_0_0_0_0';
```

I tested on DuckDB 1.1.3, 1.2.2 and Preview with the following results:

```console
# 1.2.2

100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.035 user 0.565377 sys 0.013131
Run Time (s): real 0.033 user 0.546203 sys 0.005153
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.002 user 0.005919 sys 0.001608
Run Time (s): real 0.034 user 0.557535 sys 0.004811

# Preview

100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.024 user 0.415963 sys 0.006251
Run Time (s): real 0.025 user 0.439129 sys 0.000790
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.002 user 0.007081 sys 0.000000
Run Time (s): real 0.024 user 0.422764 sys 0.004029

# 1.1.3

100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.032 user 0.519765 sys 0.012689
Run Time (s): real 0.032 user 0.530937 sys 0.001702
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.002 user 0.001749 sys 0.000988
Run Time (s): real 0.001 user 0.001185 sys 0.000008
```

We can see that the view is the same speed as the indexed table in 1.1.3, but not in 1.2.2 or preview.

### OS:

Linux pop-os 6.9.3-76060903-generic

### DuckDB Version:

1.2.2

### DuckDB Client:

Native CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

William Croxson

### Affiliation:

Spice.AI

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a nightly build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

- [x] Yes, I have

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE traces (trace_id String, transaction_hash String, transaction_index Int32, from_address String, to_address String, value Decimal64(2), input Nullable(String), output Nullable(String), trace_type String, call_type String, reward_type String, gas Int32, gas_used Int32, subtraces Int32, trace_address String, error Nullable(String), status String, block_timestamp DateTime, block_number Int32, block_hash String);
CREATE VIEW traces_view AS SELECT trace_id, transaction_hash, value FROM traces WHERE status IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Querying a view does not utilize the underlying index
